name: QA 1402
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1402

more serious v3 do nothing and V2 -> V3 conversions



Copyright (c) 2022 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py fedora-rawhide-container reproduce
